goal: Expose released yoagent DeepSeek thinking-control support in doctor readiness diagnostics so CI can verify native thinking mode is not silently degraded.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: DeepSeek doctor can report reasoning effort and stream usage while hiding that the native thinking control object is unsupported or no longer wired through the provider config.
